file.content:
generator client {
  provider = "prisma-client-js"
}

datasource db {
  provider = "postgresql"
  url      = env("DATABASE_URL")
}

model User {
  id                 String   @id @default(uuid())
  username           String   @unique
  passwordHash       String
  role               String   @default("COMPANION")
  studioId           String?
  isAuthorized       Boolean  @default(false)
  secondPasswordHash String?
  displayName        String?
  avatar             String?
  createdAt          DateTime @default(now())

  studio    Studio?     @relation(fields: [studioId], references: [id])
  companion Companion?
  csOrders  Order[]     @relation("CSUser")
}

model Studio {
  id        String   @id @default(uuid())
  name      String
  type      String   @default("DIRECT")  // DIRECT | RENTAL
  splitMode String   @default("TIERED")  // TIERED | FIXED
  createdAt DateTime @default(now())

  users             User[]
  companions        Companion[]
  orders            Order[]
  customers         Customer[]
  expenses          Expense[]
  expenseReports    ExpenseReport[]
  processBlacklists ProcessBlacklist[]
  processWhitelists ProcessWhitelist[]
}

model Companion {
  id             String   @id @default(uuid())
  userId         String   @unique
  studioId       String
  games          Json     @default("[]")
  status         String   @default("OFFLINE")
  billingCode    String   @unique
  revenueShare   Float    @default(0.6)
  monthlyRevenue Float    @default(0)
  deposit        Float    @default(0)
  balance        Float    @default(0)
  frozen         Float    @default(0)
  realName       String?
  idNumber       String?
  phone          String?
  idCardFront    String?
  idCardBack     String?
  reviewStatus   String   @default("PENDING")  // PENDING | APPROVED | REJECTED
  reviewedById   String?
  reviewedAt     DateTime?
  reviewNote     String?
  createdAt      DateTime @default(now())

  user      User            @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id])
  studio    Studio          @relation(fields: [studioId], references: [id])
  pc        CompanionPC?
  timeLogs          CompanionTimeLog[]
  attendanceRecords CompanionAttendance[]
  orders            Order[]
  coOrders          Order[]        @relation("CoCompanion")
  customers Customer[]
  transactions Transaction[]
  expenseReports ExpenseReport[]
  walletTransactions WalletTransaction[]
  workWechats WorkWechat[]
  blacklistOverrides <HIGH_ENTROPY_REDACTED>[]
  processReports     <HIGH_ENTROPY_REDACTED>[]
  processKillLogs    ProcessKillLog[]
  statusBlacklists   <HIGH_ENTROPY_REDACTED>[]
}

model CompanionPC {
  id              String    @id @default(uuid())
  companionId     String    @unique
  agentVersion    String    @default("0.0.0")
  lastHeartbeat   DateTime?
  currentMode     String    @default("ENTERTAINMENT")
  isThrottled     Boolean   @default(false)
  throttleLimitKB Int?
  createdAt       DateTime  @default(now())

  companion      Companion        @relation(fields: [companionId], references: [id])
  operationLogs  PCOperationLog[]
}

model CompanionTimeLog {
  id              String    @id @default(uuid())
  companionId     String
  mode            String
  startedAt       DateTime  @default(now())
  endedAt         DateTime?
  durationSeconds Int       @default(0)

  companion Companion @relation(fields: [companionId], references: [id])
}

model CompanionAttendance {
  id           String    @id @default(uuid())
  companionId  String
  date         DateTime
  loginAt      DateTime
  logoutAt     DateTime?
  workMinutes  Int       @default(0)
  isLate       Boolean   @default(false)
  isEarlyLeave Boolean   @default(false)
  createdAt    DateTime  @default(now())
  companion    Companion @relation(fields: [companionId], references: [id])
  @@unique([companionId, date])
}

model Order {
  id           String   @id @default(uuid())
  type         String
  studioId     String
  csUserId     String
  companionId  String?
  customerId   String
  dispatchType String
  status       String   @default("PENDING")
  amount       Float
  gameName     S... [TRUNCATED]
